subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: In climate zones 1 to 7, the aggregate solar heat gain of the glazing in each storey of a building, including any mezzanine, must—

ol.li: not exceed the allowance resulting from multiplying the floor area of each storey, measured within the enclosing walls, by the constant CSHGC obtained from Table 13.3.3a; and
be calculated in accordance with the following formula:

A 1,2,etc MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahqart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamyqamaaBa aaleaacaaIXaGaaiilaiaaikdacaGGSaGaamyzaiaadshacaWGJbaa beaaaaa@3C88@ R0lGODlhKAAZAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAKAAZAAACT4SPqcvtD6OctNqLQcg1bC5tHwiJZGmMJ/Op a+LF76K6s4bIuW255tFq8HaeVIxnO4qGQhoM9+sofEUN8+HDAbfRUFG5tC6rmeTtjE6rMQUAIf8L TWF0aFR5cGUwMDH4BQEABwREU01UNwABE1dpbkFsbEJhc2ljQ29kZVBhZ2VzABEFVGltZXMgTmV3 IFJvbWFuABEDU3ltYm9sABEFQ291cmllciBOZXcAEQRNVCBFeHRyYQASAAghL0WPRC9BUPQQD0df QVDyHx5BUPQVD0EA9EX0JfSPQl9BAPQQD0NfQQD0j0X0Kl9I9I9BAPQQD0D0j0F/SPQQD0EqX0Rf RfRfRfRfQQ8MAQABAAECAgICAAIAAQEBAAMAAQAEAAAKAQACAINBAAMAGwAACwEAAgCIMQACAIIs AAIAiDIAAgCCLAACAINlAAIAg3QAAgCDYwAAAQEAAAAAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDP/PD94bWwgdmVy c2lvbj0iMS4wIj8+PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBUcmFuc2xhdG9yQDVANUBNYXRoTUwyIChDbGlwYm9h cmQpLnRkbEBNYXRoTUwgMi4wIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpQCAtLT48bWF0aCB4bWxucz0naHR0cDovL3d3 dy53My5vcmcvMTk5OC9NYXRoL01hdGhNTCc+PG1yb3c+PG1zdWI+PG1pPkE8L21pPjxtcm93Pjxt bj4xPC9tbj48bW8+LDwvbW8+PG1uPjI8L21uPjxtbz4sPC9tbz48bWk+ZTwvbWk+PG1pPnQ8L21p PjxtaT5jPC9taT48L21yb3c+LzwvbXN1Yj48L21yb3c+PC9tYXRoPjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVARW5k QDVANUAgLS0+ACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAyBgkAAAAAAAA7 = the area of each glazing element; and

SHG C 1,2,etc MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahqart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaam4uaiaadI eacaWGhbGaam4qamaaBaaaleaacaaIXaGaaiilaiaaikdacaGGSaGa amyzaiaadshacaWGJbaabeaaaaa@3EFB@ R0lGODlhSAAZAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAASAAZAAACkYSPqcvtD6OctNqLs968+xmERjCKJXmEJpqu X8KqKdwictmyL6D3NL+IKXQ73+gHHM6Qu6PS5mwQm4yp6hrNkabUIPSbRHK74TBR+CyTl9EzG2zl WceRW9INzpbRyzHdeWOHpWViY6f2Jhf4t5aXt3XXCOKVc8Qo6QjEhwKJ6SAjgnW1RepJwXVpqrrK 2uq6WgAAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDH/BQEABwREU01UNwABE1dpbkFsbEJhc2ljQ29kZVBhZ2VzABEF VGltZXMgTmV3IFJvbWFuABEDU3ltYm9sABEFQ291cmllciBOZXcAEQRNVCBFeHRyYQASAAghL0WP RC9BUPQQD0dfQVDyHx5BUPQVD0EA9EX0JfSPQl9BAPQQD0NfQQD0j0X0Kl9I9I9BAPQQD0D0j0F/ SPQQD0EqX0RfRfRfRfRfQQ8MAQABAAECAgICAAIAAQEBAAMAAQAEAAAKAQACAINTAAIAg0gAAgCD RwACAINDAAMAGwAACwEAAgCIMQACAIIsAAIAiDIAAgCCLAACAINlAAIAg3QAAgCDCGMAAAEBAAAA ACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAz/zw/eG1sIHZlcnNpb249IjEuMCI/PjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVAVHJhbnNs YXRvckA1QDVATWF0aE1MMiAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKS50ZGxATWF0aE1MIDIuMCAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKUAg LS0+PG1hdGggeG1sbnM9J2h0dHA6Ly93d3cudzMub3JnLzE5OTgvTWF0aC9NYXRoTUwnPjxtcm93 PjxtaT5TPC9taT48bWk+SDwvbWk+PG1pPkc8L21pPjxtc3ViPjxtaT5DPC9taT48bXJvdz48bW4+ MTwvbW4+PG1vPiw8L21vPjxtbj4yPC9tbj48bW8+LDwvbW8+PG1pPmU8L01taT48bWk+dDwvbWk+ PG1pPmM8L21pPjwvbXJvdz48L21zdWI+PC9tcm93PjwvbWF0aD48IS0tIE1hdGhUeXBlQEVuZEA1 QDVAIC0tPgAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwMgYJAAAAAAAAOw== = the Total System SHGC for each glazing element not exceeding 0.7; and

E S1,S2,etc MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahqart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamyramaaBa aaleaacaWGtbGaaGymaiaacYcacaWGtbGaaGOmaiaacYcacaWGLbGa amiDaiaadogaaeqaaaaa@3E3C@ R0lGODlhNQAZAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAANQAZAAACZISPqcvtD6OctNqLs7ah+7CF4DGGWQmgZlWq K0u+5ydfbW3HOIzcYKf4GYAalW9kTAlTDVfiQxs+p8Egjci6PZM95vIkXWhJRCyPiQ6jv2mh8xGF Ksse5Xz+BkPyu77/DxhYUQAAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDH/BQEABwREU01UNwABE1dpbkFsbEJhc2lj Q29kZVBhZ2VzABEFVGltZXMgTmV3IFJvbWFuABEDU3ltYm9sABEFQ291cmllciBOZXcAEQRNVCBF eHRyYQASAAghL0WPRC9BUPQQD0dfQVDyHx5BUPQVD0EA9EX0JfSPQl9BAPQQD0NfQQD0j0X0Kl9I 9I9BAPQQD0D0j0F/SPQQD0EqX0RfRfRfRfRfQQ8MAQABAAECAgICAAIAAQEBAAMAAQAEAAAKAQAC AINFAAMAGwAACwEAAgCDUwACAIgxAAIAgiwAAgCDUwACAIgyAAIAgiwAAgCDZQACAIN0AAIAg2MA AAEBAwAAAAAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwM/88P3htbCB2ZXJzaW9uPSIxLjAiPz48IS0tIE1hdGhUeXBl QFRyYW5zbGF0b3JANUA1QE1hdGhNTDIgKENsaXBib2FyZCkudGRsQE1hdGhNTCAyLjAgKENsaXBi b2FyZClAIC0tPjxtYXRoIHhtbG5zPSdodHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9yZy8xOTk4L01hdGgvTWF0aE1M Jz48bXJvdz48bXN1Yj48bWk+RTwvbWk+PG1yb3c+PG1pPlM8L21pPjxtbj4xPC9tbj48bW8+LDwv bW8+PG1pPlM8L21pPjxtbj4yPC9tbj48bW8+LDwvbW8+PG1pPmU8L21pPjxtaT50PC9DbWk+PG1p PmM8L21pPjwvbXJvdz48L21zdWI+PC9tcm93PjwvbWF0aD48IS0tIE1hdGhUeXBlQEVuZEA1QDVA IC0tPgAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwMgYJAAAAAAAAOw== = the summer exposure factor for each glazing element obtained from Table 13.3.3b, 13.3.3c, 13.3.3d, 13.3.3e, 13.3.3f, 13.3.3g, 13.3.3h, 13.3.3i, 13.3.3j, 13.3.3k, 13.3.3l, 13.3.3m, 13.3.3n, 13.3.3o, 13.3.3p or 13.3.3q; and

R S1,S2,etc MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahqart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamOuamaaBa aaleaacaWGtbGaaGymaiaacYcacaWGtbGaaGOmaiaacYcacaWGLbGa amiDaiaadogaaeqaaaaa@3E49@ R0lGODlhNAAZAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAANAAZAAACZ4SPqcvtD6OctNqLs46h9w0CwTGGWSmaGJqq Fsq6kxfLnFHbEKxTPJn6KEYl4SpRFCWRylYO56CRiMyqFUf8GCXG3LYFTT5v4CFwChs3fjE2mEVV Dz3YrFIopRXpKjm0BxgoOEgoUQAAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDH/BQEABwREU01UNwABE1dpbkFsbEJh c2ljQ29kZVBhZ2VzABEFVGltZXMgTmV3IFJvbWFuABEDU3ltYm9sABEFQ291cmllciBOZXcAEQRN VCBFeHRyYQASAAghL0WPRC9BUPQQD0dfQVDyHx5BUPQVD0EA9EX0JfSPQl9BAPQQD0NfQQD0j0X0 Kl9I9I9BAPQQD0D0j0F/SPQQD0EqX0RfRfRfRfRfQQ8MAQABAAECAgICAAIAAQEBAAMAAQAEAAAK AQACAINSAAMAGwAACwEAAgCDUwACAIgxAAIAgiwAAgCDUwACAIgyAAIAgiwAAgCDZQACAIN0AAIA g2MAAAEBAwAAAAAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwM/88P3htbCB2ZXJzaW9uPSIxLjAiPz48IS0tIE1hdGhU eXBlQFRyYW5zbGF0b3JANUA1QE1hdGhNTDIgKENsaXBib2FyZCkudGRsQE1hdGhNTCAyLjAgKENs aXBib2FyZClAIC0tPjxtYXRoIHhtbG5zPSdodHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9yZy8xOTk4L01hdGgvTWF0 aE1MJz48bXJvdz48bXN1Yj48bWk+UjwvbWk+PG1yb3c+PG1pPlM8L21pPjxtbj4xPC9tbj48bW8+ LDwvbW8+PG1pPlM8L21pPjxtbj4yPC9tbj48bW8+LDwvbW8+PG1pPmU8L21pPjxtaT50PC9DbWk+ PG1pPmM8L21pPjwvbXJvdz48L21zdWI+PC9tcm93PjwvbWF0aD48IS0tIE1hdGhUeXBlQEVuZEA1 QDVAIC0tPgAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwMgYJAAAAAAAAOw== = the factor in Table 13.3.3r, 13.3.3s, 13.3.3t, 13.3.3u, 13.3.3v, 13.3.3w, 13.3.3x or 13.3.3y for each glazing element located in a bedroom or room which is not a conditioned space; and

L S1,S2,etc MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahqart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamitamaaBa aaleaacaWGtbGaaGymaiaacYcacaWGtbGaaGOmaiaacYcacaWGLbGa amiDaiaadogaaeqaaaaa@3E43@ R0lGODlhMgAZAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAMgAZAAACXYSPqcvtD6OctNqLsz6hhw1+YDhuYpmd6KWu VOtOcByp4ofDuNFp7d4D/IQ7YWPG8SiNiKFCtwxKpNDEEIi5MU6/oHTK4TXDRlu4WPPwekqvmg3/ miBImv2Oz+sTBQAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwMf8FAQAHBERTTVQ3AAETV2luQWxsQmFzaWNDb2RlUGFn ZXMAEQVUaW1lcyBOZXcgUm9tYW4AEQNTeW1ib2wAEQVDb3VyaWVyIE5ldwARBE1UIEV4dHJhABIA CCEvRY9EL0FQ9BAPR19BUPIfHkFQ9BUPQQD0RfQl9I9CX0EA9BAPQ19BAPSPRfQqX0j0j0EA9BAP QPSPQX9I9BAPQSpfRF9F9F9F9F9BDwwBAAEAAQICAgIAAgABAQEAAwABAAQAAAoBAAIAg0wAAwAb AAALAQACAINTAAIAiDEAAgCCLAACAINTAAIAiDIAAgCCLAACAINlAAIAg3QAAgCDYwAAAQEDAAAA ACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAz/zw/eG1sIHZlcnNpb249IjEuMCI/PjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVAVHJhbnNs YXRvckA1QDVATWF0aE1MMiAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKS50ZGxATWF0aE1MIDIuMCAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKUAg LS0+PG1hdGggeG1sbnM9J2h0dHA6Ly93d3cudzMub3JnLzE5OTgvTWF0aC9NYXRoTUwnPjxtcm93 Pjxtc3ViPjxtaT5MPC9taT48bXJvdz48bWk+UzwvbWk+PG1uPjE8L21uPjxtbz4sPC9tbz48bWk+ UzwvbWk+PG1uPjI8L21uPjxtbz4sPC9tbz48bWk+ZTwvbWk+PG1pPnQ8L0NtaT48bWk+YzwvbWk+ PC9tcm93PjwvbXN1Yj48L21yb3c+PC9tYXRoPjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVARW5kQDVANUAgLS0+ACH/ C01hdGhUeXBlMDAyBgkAAAAAAAA7 = the factor in Table 13.3.3r, 13.3.3s, 13.3.3t, 13.3.3u, 13.3.3v, 13.3.3w, 13.3.3x or 13.3.3y for each glazing element located on a floor level above the lowest floor; and

F S2,S2,etc MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahqart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamOramaaBa aaleaacaWGtbGaaGOmaiaacYcacaWGtbGaaGOmaiaacYcacaWGLbGa amiDaiaadogaaeqaaaaa@3E3E@ R0lGODlhNQAZAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAANQAZAAACZoSPqcvtD6OctNqLs7ah+7CF4DGGWQmgZlWq K0u+5ydfbW3HOLyAY6fwkVwUYiolPMaASqNxyEQQUc7E5/dkRA2qLVd6/J10QTD0m9Xqkso2+xYu erjza6tOA3pFkfTuDxgoOChRAAAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwMf8FAQAHBERTTVQ3AAETV2luQWxsQmFz aWNDb2RlUGFnZXMAEQVUaW1lcyBOZXcgUm9tYW4AEQNTeW1ib2wAEQVDb3VyaWVyIE5ldwARBE1U IEV4dHJhABIACCEvRY9EL0FQ9BAPR19BUPIfHkFQ9BUPQQD0RfQl9I9CX0EA9BAPQ19BAPSPRfQq X0j0j0EA9BAPQPSPQX9I9BAPQSpfRF9F9F9F9F9BDwwBAAEAAQICAgIAAgABAQEAAwABAAQAAAoB AAIAg0YAAwAbAAALAQACAINTAAIAiDIAAgCCLAACAINTAAIAiDIAAgCCLAACAINlAAIAg3QAAgCD YwAAAQEDAAAAACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAz/zw/eG1sIHZlcnNpb249IjEuMCI/PjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5 cGVAVHJhbnNsYXRvckA1QDVATWF0aE1MMiAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKS50ZGxATWF0aE1MIDIuMCAoQ2xp cGJvYXJkKUAgLS0+PG1hdGggeG1sbnM9J2h0dHA6Ly93d3cudzMub3JnLzE5OTgvTWF0aC9NYXRo TUwnPjxtcm93Pjxtc3ViPjxtaT5GPC9taT48bXJvdz48bWk+UzwvbWk+PG1uPjI8L21uPjxtbz4s PC9tbz48bWk+UzwvbWk+PG1uPjI8L21uPjxtbz4sPC9tbz48bWk+ZTwvbWk+PG1pPnQ8L0NtaT48 bWk+YzwvbWk+PC9tcm93PjwvbXN1Yj48L21yb3c+PC9tYXRoPjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVARW5kQDVA NUAgLS0+ACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAyBgkAAAAAAAA7 = the frame factor in Table 13.3.3r, 13.3.3s, 13.3.3t, 13.3.3u, 13.3.3v, 13.3.3w, 13.3.3x or 13.3.3y for each glazing element; and

H S1,S2,etc MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahqart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamisamaaBa aaleaacaWGtbGaaGymaiaacYcacaWGtbGaaGOmaiaacYcacaWGLbGa amiDaiaadogaaeqaaaaa@3E3F@ R0lGODlhOAAZAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAOAAZAAACaISPqcvtD6OctNqLs94u+OMFHCci5aidhopa LNtWb5yFNn3NuJvAO6QzAUSf3nDlowRBw9Ls42wkQcVm9SjMGnu3Zu0Eu2KZxNUougBzo9OIejxm a+W5ENLevUH3Xlyb+RMoOEhYuFMAACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAx/wUBAAcERFNNVDcAARNXaW5BbGxC YXNpY0NvZGVQYWdlcwARBVRpbWVzIE5ldyBSb21hbgARA1N5bWJvbAARBUNvdXJpZXIgTmV3ABEE TVQgRXh0cmEAEgAIIS9Fj0QvQVD0EA9HX0FQ8h8eQVD0FQ9BAPRF9CX0j0JfQQD0EA9DX0EA9I9F 9CpfSPSPQQD0EA9A9I9Bf0j0EA9BKl9EX0X0X0X0X0EPDAEAAQABAgICAgACAAEBAQADAAEABAAA CgEAAgCDSAADABsAAAsBAAIAg1MAAgCIMQACAIIsAAIAg1MAAgCIMgACAIIsAAIAg2UAAgCDdAAC AINjAAABAQMAAAAAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDP/PD94bWwgdmVyc2lvbj0iMS4wIj8+PCEtLSBNYXRo VHlwZUBUcmFuc2xhdG9yQDVANUBNYXRoTUwyIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpLnRkbEBNYXRoTUwgMi4wIChD bGlwYm9hcmQpQCAtLT48bWF0aCB4bWxucz0naHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMTk5OC9NYXRoL01h dGhNTCc+PG1yb3c+PG1zdWI+PG1pPkg8L21pPjxtcm93PjxtaT5TPC9taT48bW4+MTwvbW4+PG1v Piw8L21vPjxtaT5TPC9taT48bW4+MjwvbW4+PG1vPiw8L21vPjxtaT5lPC9taT48bWk+dDwvQ21p PjxtaT5jPC9taT48L21yb3c+PC9tc3ViPjwvbXJvdz48L21hdGg+PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBFbmRA NUA1QCAtLT4AIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDIGCQAAAAAAADs= = the floor factor in Table 13.3.3r, 13.3.3s, 13.3.3t, 13.3.3u, 13.3.3v, 13.3.3w, 13.3.3x or 13.3.3y for each glazing element.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: For the purposes of this clause—

ol.li: orientation sectors must be determined in accordance with Figure 13.3.2a; and
P/H must be measured in accordance with Figure 13.3.2b.

ul.li: There is little or no need for cooling at any time of the year in climate zone 8. Therefore, this clause does not apply in climate zone 8.

By referring to ‘glazing elements’, 13.3.3 require Total System U-Values and Total System SHGCs to be assessed for the combined effect of glass and frames. The measurement of these Total System U-Values and Total System SHGCs is specified in the Technical Protocols and Procedures Manual for Energy Rating of Fenestration by the Australian Fenestration Rating Council (AFRC) for glazing elements of representative size and arrangements.

Various assessors using AFRC procedures might refer to their published performance values by slightly different terms including ‘U Factor’ or ‘Uw’ for Total System U-Value or ‘SHGC’ for Total System SHGC. Such values can be used under 13.3.3 provided they measure the combined glass and frame performance according to AFRC requirements.

For the room factor, the solar heat gains to bedrooms and unconditioned areas have less impact on the cooling loads of dwellings than solar heat gains to a living area due to the different time of day that the rooms are occupied. Bedrooms are typically not occupied during the day when outdoor temperatures and solar heat gains are higher.
For the frame factor, the darker the window frame, the greater the solar heat gain through the frame. Radiation gains from windows are multiplied by this factor.

For the floor factor, this is only applied for dwellings with a floor in contact with the ground. If a room has a tiled surface or is a polished slab, radiation gains in this room are multiplied by this factor.
